subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 736837160/240508208 is not a GRB
body:
R. Hamburg (CNRS/IN2P3/IJCLab) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 736837160/240508208 at 04:59:15.73 UT
on 08 May 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a solar flare."
